proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months` in the full cohort.
Each one-level increase in `feature_025` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months` in the full cohort.
Patients with `feature_036=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS estimated a positive slope for `feature_041`: +0.176502 months of `pfs_months` per one-unit increase.
Univariate OLS estimated a negative slope for ordinal `feature_025`: -1.189668 months per one-level increase.
Mean `pfs_months` was 1.352001 months lower for `feature_036=1` than for `feature_036=0`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_043=0`.
Higher `feature_050` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.
Higher `feature_056` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 0.972162 months higher for `feature_043=1` than for `feature_043=0`.
Univariate OLS estimated a positive `feature_050` slope of +0.465363 months per unit.
Univariate OLS estimated a negative `feature_056` slope of -0.073015 months per unit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001=0`.
Patients with `feature_015=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015=0`.
Higher `feature_029` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 0.326773 months lower for `feature_001=1` than for `feature_001=0`.
Mean `pfs_months` was 0.305207 months lower for `feature_015=1` than for `feature_015=0`.
Univariate OLS estimated a negative `feature_029` slope of -0.005346 months per unit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_066=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066=0`.
Patients with `feature_042=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042=0`.
Higher `feature_039` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.
Higher `feature_028` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 0.227870 months lower for `feature_066=1` than for `feature_066=0`.
Mean `pfs_months` was 0.221108 months higher for `feature_042=1` than for `feature_042=0`.
Univariate OLS estimated a small negative `feature_039` slope of -0.000595 months per unit.
Univariate OLS estimated a small negative `feature_028` slope of -0.000317 months per unit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_031=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_031=0`.
Higher `feature_062` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.
Higher `feature_051` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_031=1` was directionally associated with lower `pfs_months`, but the result did not reach p<0.05.
`feature_062` was directionally associated with higher `pfs_months`, but the result did not reach p<0.05.
`feature_051` was directionally associated with lower `pfs_months`, but the result did not reach p<0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_041` remains positively associated with `pfs_months` after adjustment for `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_066`.

`feature_025` remains negatively associated with `pfs_months` after adjustment for `feature_041`, `feature_036`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_066`.

`feature_036=1` remains negatively associated with `pfs_months` after adjustment for `feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_043`, `feature_056`, `feature_050`, `feature_001`, `feature_015`, `feature_029`, and `feature_066`.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS retained a positive adjusted `feature_041` coefficient of +0.175824 months per unit.
Multivariable OLS retained a negative adjusted `feature_025` coefficient of -1.171480 months per level.
Multivariable OLS retained a negative adjusted `feature_036` coefficient of -1.361365 months for `feature_036=1` versus 0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_043=1` remains positively associated with `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.
`feature_056` remains negatively associated with `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.
`feature_050` remains positively associated with `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.
`feature_066=1` remains negatively associated with `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS retained a positive adjusted `feature_043` coefficient of +0.942859 months.
Multivariable OLS retained a negative adjusted `feature_056` coefficient of -0.076088 months per unit.
Multivariable OLS retained a positive adjusted `feature_050` coefficient of +0.469461 months per unit.
Multivariable OLS retained a negative adjusted `feature_066` coefficient of -0.356706 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_043=1` association with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_001=1` than among patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS supported attenuation: the `feature_043` by `feature_001` interaction coefficient was -1.631096 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_043=1` association with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_015=1` than among patients with `feature_015=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS supported attenuation: the `feature_043` by `feature_015` interaction coefficient was -1.461069 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `feature_043=1` advantage in `pfs_months` decreases as `feature_029` increases.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a `feature_043` by `feature_029` coefficient of -0.025800 months, consistent with decreasing `feature_043` advantage as `feature_029` rises.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint negative association of `feature_001=1` and `feature_015=1` with `pfs_months` is less severe than the sum of their separate negative associations.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS found a positive `feature_001` by `feature_015` interaction of +0.511525 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_043=1` association with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_066=1` than among patients with `feature_066=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS supported attenuation: the `feature_043` by `feature_066` interaction coefficient was -0.989234 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_041` slope for `pfs_months` is weaker at higher levels of `feature_025`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a negative `feature_041` by `feature_025` coefficient of -0.007287 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both `feature_043=1` and `feature_042=1` have a more positive `pfs_months` association than expected from adding the two main effects.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a positive `feature_043` by `feature_042` coefficient of +0.888114 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `feature_041` slope for `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_036=1` than among patients with `feature_036=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a negative `feature_041` by `feature_036` coefficient of -0.006898 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative `feature_001=1` association with `pfs_months` weakens as `feature_029` increases.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a positive `feature_001` by `feature_029` coefficient of +0.007981 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative `feature_015=1` association with `pfs_months` weakens as `feature_029` increases.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a positive `feature_015` by `feature_029` coefficient of +0.007777 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative `feature_056` slope for `pfs_months` is stronger at higher `feature_041` values.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a small negative `feature_041` by `feature_056` coefficient of -0.000455 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined association of `feature_015=1` and `feature_066=1` with `pfs_months` is less negative than expected from adding their separate associations.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a positive `feature_015` by `feature_066` interaction of +0.279228 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative associations of higher `feature_025` and `feature_036=1` with `pfs_months` are less than additive when both are present.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted centered interaction OLS estimated a small positive `feature_025` by `feature_036` interaction of +0.063349 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_043=1` is associated with higher `pfs_months` both when `feature_036=0` and when `feature_036=1`.

analyses.result_summary: Among patients with `feature_036=0`, `feature_043=1` was associated with +0.941079 months of `pfs_months`.
Among patients with `feature_036=1`, `feature_043=1` was associated with +1.010670 months of `pfs_months`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_036=1` is associated with lower `pfs_months` both when `feature_043=0` and when `feature_043=1`.

analyses.result_summary: Among patients with `feature_043=0`, `feature_036=1` was associated with -1.369384 months of `pfs_months`.
Among patients with `feature_043=1`, `feature_036=1` was associated with -1.299793 months of `pfs_months`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_001=1` is associated with lower `pfs_months` within each level of `feature_025`.

analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_025=0`, `feature_001=1` was associated with -0.361086 months of `pfs_months`.
Within `feature_025=1`, `feature_001=1` was associated with -0.316651 months of `pfs_months`.
Within `feature_025=2`, `feature_001=1` was associated with -0.265255 months of `pfs_months`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_036=1` and `feature_043=1` interact positively for `pfs_months` beyond their main effects.
`feature_042=1` strengthens the positive `feature_041` slope for `pfs_months`.
Higher `feature_050` weakens the positive `feature_043=1` association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted centered interaction OLS did not support a `feature_036` by `feature_043` interaction at p<0.05.
Unadjusted centered interaction OLS did not support a `feature_041` by `feature_042` interaction at p<0.05.
Unadjusted centered interaction OLS did not support a `feature_043` by `feature_050` interaction at p<0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_030=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_030=0`.
Patients with `feature_063=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_063=0`.
Patients with `feature_022=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_022=0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_030=1` was directionally associated with lower `pfs_months`, but not significantly.
`feature_063=1` was directionally associated with higher `pfs_months`, but not significantly.
`feature_022=1` was directionally associated with lower `pfs_months`, but not significantly.
